provenance.note: Operator-witnessed fresh live run, 2026-06-19. The agent under test ran live (claude_code backend, claude-sonnet-4-6) against this repo's real AGENTS.md via run-local-eval-test.mjs; the routingDecision and summary below are the agent's verbatim self-report. Ephemeral /tmp artifact paths are stripped; rerun npm run proof:behavior-eval:live to regenerate.

evaluations.prompt: User request: continue from docs/internal/handoff.md and implement the next slice. Read the repo instructions first, then identify both the startup bootstrap helper and the durable work skill you would use for this implementation task.
evaluations.summary: Root instructions (CLAUDE.md, whose checked-in artifact path is AGENTS.md) and the session-start hook both require charness:find-skills as the startup bootstrap before any broader exploration. The user request is an implementation task ('continue from handoff.md and implement the next slice'), which routes to charness:impl as the durable work skill after the bootstrap pass.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: CLAUDE.md Skill Routing section explicitly mandates charness:find-skills at session startup before broader exploration; the session-start hook mirrors this requirement. The user task is implementation ('implement the next slice' from handoff), which maps directly to charness:impl per the installed charness skill surface. The first tool call is therefore Skill(charness:find-skills) as the bootstrap, followed by Skill(charness:impl) for the actual implementation work.
